name: HWR_SRVY_SENTIMENT_B
description: This will store the sentiments that will be used by sentiment analysis job.

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Sentiment Id identifying the Sentiment entry in this table.

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_URI
columns.Comments: This is the URI of the Sentiment.

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: SENTIMENT_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: SENTIMENT_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: SENTIMENT_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SENTIMENT_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: SENTIMENT_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
